subject: [PATCH 1/6] nfsd: size fh_verify server sockaddr slot by xpt_locallen

2026-05-31.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS daemon's tracepoint handling by sizing the server sockaddr slot correctly when copying from xpt_local. The issue was that the slot was sized by xpt_remotelen, but filled from xpt_local using xpt_locallen, leading to potential buffer overflows or underflows. The fix is to size the server slot with xpt_locallen, matching the copy length. This patch only affects the nfsd_fh_verify and nfsd_fh_verify_err tracepoints, which are now consistent with other NFSD tracepoints that record the server address.
